seo.title: Full Stack Developer Resume Examples & ATS Templates 2026
seo.description: Write a perfect Full Stack Developer resume in 2026. Includes MERN/PERN stack keywords, common mistakes, and a complete resume example that passes ATS.
seo.keywords: full stack developer resume, MERN stack resume, react node.js resume, full stack engineer resume template, web developer resume 2026
seo.ogDescription: The exact full stack resume template that lands MERN/Next.js developer interviews.

hero.title: Full Stack Developer Resume Examples
hero.description: Full stack developers are the Swiss Army knife of engineering. Your resume needs to show depth AND breadth — this guide shows you exactly how to present your skills for maximum impact.

mistakes: Listing both frontend and backend skills equally but not demonstrating you can own a full feature end-to-end.
No deployed apps in portfolio — full stack developers MUST have live, accessible projects.
Listing 'full stack developer' as a title without specifying the stack — be specific (e.g., 'Full Stack Developer (React/Node.js)').
tips: For each project, clearly state: frontend stack, backend stack, database, deployment — ATS crawls for this.
Highlight ownership: 'Sole developer responsible for all layers' signals you can work independently.
Link to your most polished deployed project prominently — it's your most powerful interview opener.

exampleResume.name: David Kim
exampleResume.title: Full Stack Developer (React / Node.js)
exampleResume.summary: Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building production-grade web applications end-to-end. Sole engineer behind TechLaunch's SaaS platform serving 15k users. Expert in React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and AWS deployment.

bullets: Sole engineer who architected and built the entire SaaS platform (React/TypeScript + Node.js/Express + PostgreSQL) from zero to 15k active users.
Implemented Stripe billing integration generating $180k ARR. Built role-based auth system, webhooks, and automated email workflows with Resend.
Reduced API response time by 65% through PostgreSQL query optimization, strategic indexing, and Redis caching layer.
Built 12 client web applications using React, Node.js, and MongoDB, delivering all projects on time and within budget.
Implemented Stripe payment integrations and Google OAuth for 5 client apps.

exampleResume.skills: React.js, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, AWS (EC2, RDS, S3), GitHub Actions CI/CD, REST API, GraphQL, Stripe, WebSockets
